messages.body:
Diana,

Week 1 status:

✅ ON TRACK: Kickoff complete. Action items distributed. All parties confirmed receipt.
✅ ON TRACK: DataBridge to deliver data mapping v1 by January 15th (on schedule).
✅ ON TRACK: CloudPeak has begun base network topology setup.

Nothing requiring your attention this week.

Sarah

Diana,

Week 2 status:

✅ ON TRACK: DataBridge delivered data mapping v1 on January 15th — on schedule.
✅ ON TRACK: Acme review underway (Marcus + Linda). Target approval January 22nd.
🔵 NOTE: Technical review call on January 14th resulted in a decision to shift to single-phase migration (all endpoints on Feb 14 vs. phased approach). Tom Reyes confirmed DataBridge can support this. CloudPeak notified. SOW implication may be minor — Kevin is aware.

Nothing requiring your attention this week.

Sarah
messages.note: Diana was NOT consulted on the phasing decision change before this email. The email presents it as a done deal.

messages.body:
Diana,

Week 3 status:

⚠️ MINOR DELAY: Data mapping review sent to DataBridge on January 20th with required revisions. Awaiting DataBridge response — this is a normal review cycle. Approval may slip a few days past the 22nd. Monitoring.
✅ ON TRACK: CloudPeak environment setup progressing.
✅ ON TRACK: No impact to February 14th cutover date at this time.

Nothing requiring your attention this week.

Sarah
messages.note: As of Jan 23, DataBridge has been silent for 3 days on a critical-path document. The word 'minor' and 'normal review cycle' significantly understates the risk. No mention of Kevin Park's unresponsiveness.

messages.body:
Diana,

Week 4 status:

⚠️ AT RISK: DataBridge had a personnel transition (Tom Reyes, their Solutions Architect, left the company on Jan 23). I discovered this on January 28th after the mapping review received no response. I re-engaged DataBridge and their developer Aisha Patel is now handling technical items. We had a re-alignment call on January 29th. DataBridge has acknowledged the review comments and is working on v1.2.
⚠️ AT RISK: Architecture package delivery to CloudPeak will be delayed by approximately 4-5 days (was Jan 29, now targeting Feb 3). CloudPeak has been informed.
📋 WATCHING: February 14th cutover is still the plan. Will have a clearer picture by mid-next week.

May need your input next week if timeline situation changes. Will advise.

Sarah
messages.note: First mention of Tom Reyes departure — two weeks after he left, nine days after Marcus raised it verbally in the Jan 28 sync. CloudPeak's security configuration issue (Jordan's email) has not yet surfaced.
